final:
module nat(
    input wire clk,
    input wire rst,
    input wire [31:0] internal_ip,
    input wire [31:0] external_ip,
    output reg [31:0] translated_ip
);
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge rst or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (rst) begin
            translated_ip <= 32'b0;
        end else begin
            if (external_ip[31] == 1'b0) begin
                translated_ip <= internal_ip;
            end else begin
                translated_ip <= external_ip;
            end
        end
    end
endmodule
